title: Lodhran Heat Wave
lead: Lodhran is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +6.86. The city's temperature has reached critical levels, scoring 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Lodhran has led to extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 23.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 26%, and the wind speed is 9.9 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no cooling relief, and the situation is critical.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
